name: Vivaldi
description: Feature-rich, privacy-focused web browser built on Chromium and designed for power users.

years.notes: Flat redesign introduced with Vivaldi 1.11 (August 2017). Replaced the original skeuomorphic long-shadow V mark with a simpler rounded-square + white circle + V symbol. Canonical cross-platform icon, still current as of 2026. Wikimedia file last optimized September 2019.
